title: AirDropSpigot
description: This is a very simple AirDrop plugin. It works both Spigot and Paper
body:
Commands:

/airdrop join <arena>
/airdrop leave
/airdrop show
/airdrop admin
/airdrop perm start
/airdrop perm stop

/airdrop - admin commands:

/airdrop admin...
arena
starter <name>
loot <name> <chance>
holograms delete
chests <arena>
reload

arena 

pos1
pos2
spawn
create
